articles.author: Carmeli Argana
articles.title: Australian Stocks Tumble, Eyeing Technical Correction Territory - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Australian stocks fell, nearing a technical correction as investors’ anxieties over the Iran war hit the country’s commodity-rich market.
articles.content:
Australian stocks fell, nearing a technical correction as investors anxieties over the Iran war hit the countrys commodity-rich market.
